name: code-review
description: A v3 PR review workflow. Reads a diff, evaluates security exposure inside the relevant card, then checks coverage and style before writing the review.

steps.instruction:
Read the full diff for PR #{pr_number}. Summarize intent, surface area,
and the riskiest changed files. Write the receipt to .conductor/artifacts/0.md.
steps.title: Read Pr

steps.instruction:
Decide whether this PR touches authentication, authorization, secrets,
input handling, or anything network-facing. Write the decision and evidence to .conductor/artifacts/1.md.
steps.title: Touches Security

steps.instruction:
Check the security decision. If security-sensitive areas were touched, audit the changed files against the OWASP top 10 and flag injection,
auth bypass, leaked secrets, and unsafe deserialization with file:line. If not, write a receipt proving no security audit was needed. Write the receipt to .conductor/artifacts/2.md.
steps.title: Security Audit

steps.instruction: Verify the PR includes tests for its new behavior and that the suite passes. Write the receipt to .conductor/artifacts/3.md.
steps.title: Coverage Check

steps.instruction: Check the diff against the project's style and conventions. Write the receipt to .conductor/artifacts/4.md.
steps.title: Style Check

steps.instruction:
Write the review for PR #{pr_number}: a verdict (approve / request changes),
grouped findings, and the single most important thing to fix first.
steps.title: Write Review
